sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n28306" key="dramatou/rghma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δρᾱμᾰτούργ-ημα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n28306.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">dramatic composition,</tr_> Id.</sense> </entryFree>
